analysis.reasoning: Core message: External pressure strengthens Chinese unity, social cohesion, and economic resilience. Evaluation: CH1—Implied external adversary applying pressure (likely the West) but no explicit moral judgment about the West’s immorality/decadence; focus is on China’s response, so CH1 is not clearly promoted. CH2—No discussion of China’s benevolence or international cooperation; not applicable. CH3—Invokes "History has proved" and emphasizes recurring resilience of the Chinese people and economy under pressure, fitting the historical resilience theme; aligns with CH3. CH4—No explicit advocacy of China’s political system or values; not applicable. CH5—Claims of societal cohesion and economic resilience reflect success under the CCP’s governance; suggests government-led robustness; partially aligns with CH5. CH6—No cultural/nature content; not applicable. Conclusion: CH3 and CH5 are supported.
